description: **OK Café** is hiring Host Cashiers at their Sandy Springs location, a family-owned restaurant that's been going strong for 37 years. The posted pay runs $21–$23 an hour, and the gig comes with health, dental, vision, 401k matching, paid vacation, and no late nights. If you want a steady, professional environment close to the area, this one's worth a look.

description: **Southeast Clips** is looking for full or part-time hair stylists and barbers at their Doraville location. They're the largest Great Clips franchisee in the country and put a real emphasis on effective wage, which they describe as base pay plus productivity, product commissions, and tips combined. The snippet says their staff averaged $31.26/hr last week, so if you've got cosmetology skills and want flexible hours with an established customer base, it's worth checking out.

description: **Bibler Masonry Contractors, Inc.** is hiring a Construction Estimator out of their Roswell office. The role is focused on commercial and industrial projects, covering cost estimates, bid preparation, and material takeoffs in close collaboration with project teams. A solid fit for someone with a background in commercial construction estimating who wants to stay in the Atlanta area.

description: **Carenest Health Services** has a 13-week contract opening for a Wound Care Registered Nurse, with a Monday through Friday, 8am–4:30pm schedule. The role requires at least two years of recent wound care experience and current AHA BLS and CWOCN certifications. Worth a look for any RN with a specialty background who wants weekends free.

description: **Caring Hands United, Inc.** is looking for bilingual (Spanish-speaking) CNAs and PCAs for weekend daytime shifts in the Stone Mountain area, with clients also in Alpharetta. The work involves in-home care for elderly individuals and people with disabilities. If you have a caregiving background and are looking for part-time weekend hours, this one is a match.

**Bonus help (free):** WorkSource Cobb is Cobb County's free career resource for job seekers. They offer job matching, resume help, and career coaching for residents in the area. Worth a visit if you're in the middle of a search or just starting one.

**Cobb County Sheriff's Office** is currently hiring. Open positions are listed on their careers page and can range from sworn law enforcement roles to civilian support positions. Worth a look if you're interested in public service close to home.

**Cobb County** posts its open government positions through their careers portal on governmentjobs.com. Roles span departments across the county, so if you're interested in local government work, it's a good page to bookmark and check regularly.

scraped_snippet: YMCA careers Atlanta offer rewarding roles to impact your community. Apply now to make a difference!
description: **Atlanta YMCA** is hiring for roles across their locations, including positions that let you make a real impact in the community. Open jobs are posted on their careers page. A good fit for anyone who wants to work somewhere with a mission behind it.
